name: mailpit
description: Work with a Mailpit test mailbox: 14 MCP tools (read, search, send, wait-for, link/HTML checks) plus an email-verification skill

mcp_url.title: Mailpit MCP endpoint URL
mcp_url.description: The /mcp endpoint of your mailpit-mcp-server instance, e.g. http://your-host:3000/mcp

auth_token.title: Bearer token
auth_token.description: The MCP_AUTH_TOKEN configured on the server; leave empty if the server runs without auth
